security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Safe cleanup for AI coding workspaces
bundle.longDescription: VibeVac separates source and Git state from verified rebuildable caches, then lets you reclaim storage with an explicit, revalidated cleanup plan.
